headline: India Expands Tiger Reserves After Population Surge
summary: India reports a 25% rise in its tiger population over the past decade, prompting new protected reserves.
why: Shows how conservation efforts can bring species back from the brink.

headline: World Polio Cases Fall to Historic Low
summary: The WHO announced global polio cases dropped to fewer than 100 worldwide for the first time.
why: Proof that vaccines and public health campaigns can eradicate disease.

headline: Anonymous Donor Pays Off School Lunch Debt
summary: A kind donor cleared more than $200,000 in unpaid lunch fees for families across several school districts.
why: Highlights the impact of generosity on community well-being.

headline: New Battery Tech Doubles Electric Car Range
summary: German engineers unveiled a prototype EV battery capable of doubling driving distance on a single charge.
why: A leap toward sustainable, long-range transportation.

headline: Mayan Language Revitalization Sees Record Enrollment
summary: Schools across Mexico reported record numbers of students enrolling in courses to learn Mayan languages.
why: Cultural revival strengthens identity and heritage for future generations.

headline: Local café feeds the homeless every Sunday
summary: A community café offers free meals weekly to support those in need.
why: Shows the power of small acts of kindness.

headline: Amazon reforestation sees record growth
summary: Thousands of new trees planted across deforested areas in the Amazon.
why: Vital progress for biodiversity and climate stability.

headline: Breakthrough in Alzheimer’s research
summary: Scientists discovered a new protein pathway that could lead to earlier treatment.
why: Offers hope to millions affected by Alzheimer’s disease.
